titleStmt.title: SII 16.4: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 4. (A.R. No. 522 of 1906.) KADIRI KADIRI TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine of the Lakshmīnarasiṁhasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1274, Nandana, Kārtika śu. 11, Saturday, corresponding to 1352 A.D., October 20, º13.
It records that Pandimasannāyini Cheli-nāyaka completed the construction of the maṇḍapa of Aubhaladēva temple in Kadiri when Vīra Bukkaṇa Oḍeya was ruling at Dōrasamudram and Penugoṇḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
svastiśrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1274 Agu naṁda
na saṁvatsara kā¨rttika sudha 11 va Apaṭki svasti śrīmaṁnma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa hiṁdūrāya suratrāṇa
bhāsegetapuvarāyaragaṁḍa phū¨rvvapaścimasamudrādhipati
śrī vīrabukkaṇa voḍayalu dōrasamudramu penugoṁḍa sukha
saṁkathāvinōdaṁbuna prithivirājyaṁmu sēyagānu svasti śrīmatu sa
tyapratipālaka garuvāraṁbha gaṁbhīramēru kūḍikūṭake
tapuvanāyaṁkaragaṁḍa bhāsegetapuvanāyaṁkaragaṁḍa bā
sepratipālaka paṁdimasaṁnnāIni celināInigāru
kadiri Avubhaḷadēvara nagarimaṁṭapamu tirubani paripū
¨rtti sēsiri . yāvaścaṁdraśca suriyaśca tāvattiṣṭati mēdi
nī . yāvadrāmakathā lōkē tāvadrājyaṁ vibhīṣaṇa . maṁgaḷa
mahāśrīśrīśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.4 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
